verse_text: and said, 'Assuredly, I say to you, unless you are converted and become as little children, you will by no means enter the kingdom of heaven.

links.context: The Scriptures differentiate between being dependent on God, or childlike ([[MAT.18:3]]), and being childish or immature.
Little ones refers primarily to children, and by extension to anyone whose heart is humble and dependent on God (see notes at [[MAT.18:1]]-4, 6).
